name: Chocolate Nut Slices
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Pecans, Cut into Large Pieces
1/2 cup White Melting Chocolate, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 20 Minutes Bake Time: 10 Minutes
1. Heat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the Butter Flavor Crisco, granulated sugar, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla using an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended. Add the egg and beat until incorporated.
3. In another bowl, mix the flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Gradually add this dry mixture to the creamed ingredients, stirring until just combined. Stir in the pecans and chocolate chips.
4. Divide the dough into four equal portions. Roll each portion into a 1-inch thick roll measuring 8 inches long on wax paper. Place the rolls about 3 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Remove from oven and let cool completely on the baking sheet.
6. To make the drizzle, melt the white chocolate with the Butter Flavor Crisco in a microwave on low power or at 50% power, stirring until smooth. Drizzle over the cooled cookies and sprinkle with chopped pecans if desired.
7. Cut each roll diagonally into 1-inch slices.
Makes 40 slices.
Note: To harden the chocolate quickly, place the cookies in the refrigerator for a few minutes before serving or storing.
